title: Polystichum oligophlebium
taxonomy: Polystichum oligophlebium is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This species is native to Asia and is part of the large Polystichum genus that contains over 180 species of ferns. The classification of Polystichum oligophlebium places it within the kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, and class Polypodiopsida. Within the kingdom Plantae, Polystichum oligophlebium is a member of the division Magnoliophyta. The classification of Polystichum oligophlebium also places it within the order Polypodiales and family Dryopteridaceae.
